title: Doughnut+ (for Donut SMP)
description: Resource pack build for the DonutSMP that adds custom server items textures in Vanilla style.
body:
![Title of Doughnut+ resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f199899bc80c9b9fcedb3ff30b100c55216febbe.png)

# Pack update for DSMP last changes is in progress.

**Resource pack for the Donut SMP server that textures custom items with a vanilla style built to fit in with default textures!**

**Make sure this pack is at the top of your selection.**

## Compatibility
This resource pack does not require any extra mods to work, so you can use it directly in vanilla Minecraft but only from version 1.21.5+
- Vanilla launcher (means no mod is needed to make it work)
- Java 1.21.5 - 26.1.2
- Bedrock is not supported

## See Features in gallery!

If you have any **issues**, **ideas** or you just want to chat about it, please join my [**Discord Server**](https://discord.gg/GqEJxZqJgT).

___
**Do not copy or repost this pack as your own!**

![Skelly Cartel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a9f2e0f27282382766012f2af1554cc0a832433_0.webp)
[https://discord.gg/B8GMhnen](https://discord.gg/B8GMhnen)
